---
title: "Raw Data Upload"
author: "World Bank / UNHCR Joint Team"
date: today
---

## Overview

Before a survey can be harmonized, its raw microdata must exist on **Datalibweb**.
If a raw dataset is not already available there, it must first be uploaded through
**PRIMUS** (Primary Review of Indicators and Microdata Upload System), the World Bank
platform for uploading, reviewing, and approving microdata prior to publication.

::: {.bg-light-blue .pa3 .br2 .f6}
**Check first:** query Datalibweb / PRIMUS to confirm whether the raw survey is
already present before starting a new upload transaction.
:::

## Uploading via PRIMUS

Raw files are uploaded as a PRIMUS **transaction**, using the `RAWPROC` process (or
the process assigned to the relevant survey program). The [`primus` R
package](https://github.com/worldbank/primus-r) is the recommended client for
scripted uploads; see its `docs/` folder for the full PRIMUS user manuals.

```r
library(primus)

# Discover the processes you can act on
primus_list_processes()

# What folders / extensions does the process accept?
primus_folders(process_name = "RAWPROC")

# Upload a raw data file (creates a new transaction)
up <- primus_upload(
  process_name = "RAWPROC",
  survey_id    = "AGO_2029_HBS_V01_M",
  type         = "raw",
  infile       = "subin.dta",
  folder_name  = "Data/Stata"
)

# Add additional files to the same transaction
primus_upload(
  process_name   = "RAWPROC",
  survey_id      = "AGO_2029_HBS_V01_M",
  type           = "raw",
  infile         = "deflators.dta",
  folder_name    = "Data/Stata",
  transaction_id = up$transaction_id
)

# Confirm the draft transaction once all files are attached
primus_confirm(up$transaction_id)
```

## Authentication

`primus` defaults to the **plugin gateway**, which reuses the same Datalibweb bearer
token as the `dlw` R package (valid 30 days, renewed on the Datalibweb website). See
the `primus` package's `authentication` vignette for the Azure AD gateway, used only
for endpoints not exposed on the plugin gateway.

## Outcome

Once confirmed, the raw transaction is queued for the relevant reviewers. Approved
raw files become the input to the [harmonization step](03-harmonization.qmd).
